zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon I於1340年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親Sir William Vernon28歲，母親Margaret de Stockport25歲。他於1361年與Juliana de Pembridge在英國爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年9月8日在英國斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Vernon I于1340年出生在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir William Vernon28岁，母亲Margaret de Stockport25岁。他于1361年与Juliana de Pembridge在英国爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年9月8日在英国斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon I was born in 1340, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir William Vernon, was 28 and his mother, Margaret de Stockport, was 25. He married Juliana de Pembridge in 1361, in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 September 1386, in Harlaston, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon I est né en 1340, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Vernon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Stockport, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Pembridge en 1361, à Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1386, à Harlaston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Vernon I 1340 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Vernon 28 und seine Mutter Margaret de Stockport 25. Er hat 1361 in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England Juliana de Pembridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1386 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Harlaston, Staffordshire, England.

Lui sposato Juliana de Pembridge nel 1361, nel Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1386, nel Harlaston, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon Iが1340年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Sir William Vernonは28歳，母Margaret de Stockportは25歳であった。1361年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオン イン ワバートンでJuliana de Pembridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年9月8日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアハーラストンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon I(이)가 1340년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Vernon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Stockport(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1361년 영국 체실르 해턴 인 와버턴에서 Juliana de Pembridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 9월 8일 영국 스태퍼드실르 하를라스턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon I nasceu em 1340, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Vernon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Stockport, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Pembridge em 1361, em Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1386, em Harlaston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon I родился в 1340 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Vernon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Stockport, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Pembridge в 1361 г. в местности хаттон ин вавиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 сентября 1386 г. в местности харластон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Juliana de Pembridge en 1361, en Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1386, en Harlaston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
